---
title: "Meeval Augustine"
image: images/profile.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/meeval-augustine-60518323a
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Meeval20
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:augustinemeeval@gmail.com
---

Detail-oriented Data Analyst with hands-on expertise in **SQL, Power BI, MS Excel, and Python**, delivering data-driven insights to enhance business efficiency and revenue growth. Skilled communicator with a talent for presenting complex data clearly and concisely to stakeholders across diverse departments.

Please explore my [Projects](projects/index.qmd) to see examples of my work, or view my [CV](cv/cv.pdf) to learn more about my professional background.
